  "claims": [
    "The establishment of the 9-8-8 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline in California aims to combat the rising mental health crisis.",
    "The 9-8-8 system is intended to improve behavioral health crisis prevention, response, and stabilization across the nation.",
    "Calling 9-8-8 connects individuals to a trained mental health professional.",
    "AB 988 sets a precedent in crisis response and crisis coverage for mental health services.",
